log: === INITIATIVE ===

Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 46/67

⚡ Triton — Unarmored Caster casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:18 total 28 vs AC 15 — still hits.

Triton — Unarmored Caster casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Triton — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Triton — Unarmored Caster for 8. HP: 27/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Triton — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Triton — Unarmored Caster casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 12 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Triton — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Triton — Unarmored Caster for 6. HP: 33/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 6/67
→ Triton — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Triton — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
